name: Change ofPlaces Right to Left
preceding_figure_names: Basic In Place,Fallaway Rock,Link,Mooch,Reverse Whip,Stalking Walks, Flicks and Break,Toe Heel Swivels,Walks,Whip
following_figure_names: Chugging,Link,Change of Places Left to Right (normal; or with change of hands when Change of Places R to L is danced with change of hands),Change of Hands Behind Back,Hip Bump,American Spin (from L to R hand hold; or when Change of Places R to L is danced with change of hands),Stop and Go,Miami Special (when Change of Places R to L is danced with change of hands),Shoulder Spin (when Change of Places R to L is danced with change of hands),Catapult (when Change of Places R to L is danced with change of hands)
notes:
Variation - Change of hands: 2 options
lead lady with RH to turn R on 5, release R hand hold. Catch R-to-R hand hold at end of lady's turn.
Man leads lady do a R underarm turn and change to R-to-R hand hold at end of her turn.
Development:
Man leads the lady to increase her speed on step 5, Man keeping his arm raised until step 8.
Lady spin about 1 1/8 R on RF toward end of 5, then continue to turn another 5/8 to R over 6-8 to end LF back in open position.

steps.action: Fallaway Rock step back with left foot, 1/8 turn to left, no turn on 2
Diagonal forward left foot to chassé LRL, turning lady to left over 3-4
Forward chassé RLR to open position, 1/8 turn left between 5-6
Fallaway Rock step back with right foot, 1/4 turn to right
Side chassé RLR, turning underarm to left, start turn right on 5
Diagonal back left foot to chassé LRL, turning underarm to end in open position, 3/4 turn to right over 5-8
